title: 2026 Oscars Best Supporting Actress Preview
text: DraftKings presents the five nominees competing for Best Supporting Actress at the 2026 Oscars: Amy Madigan (Weapons) at -140 favorite odds, Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another) at +230 odds, Wunmi Mosaku (Sinners) at +260 odds, Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas (Sentimental Value) at +3000 odds, and Elle Fanning (Sentimental Value) at +10000 odds. Amy Madigan's first nomination since 1986 marks a significant career moment as she portrays the mysterious and sinister Aunt Gladys in Weapons, earning a Critics' Choice Award. However, the film's lack of other Academy nominations historically disadvantages solo contenders. Teyana Taylor brings strong momentum from a Golden Globes victory with work in the opening half of Paul Thomas Anderson's film showcasing her ability to command scenes opposite major talent despite limited screen time. Wunmi Mosaku benefits from the massive success of Sinners, which received a record 16 nominations, with her character Annie functioning as the heart of the story.
